title: Mary Jane
lyrics:
[MuKuRo「Mary Jane ft. ¥ellow Bucks」歌詞]

[Chorus: MuKuRo]
Oh my Mary (Ay) Jane come back to me I wanna touch all day night
Oh my Mary (Ay) Jane come back to me come back
Spend the money, waste some time
Know I got it, But Not in vain
Oh my Mary (Ay) Jane come back to me come back

[Verse 1: MuKuRo]
This is insane, maybe you right
この関係のままじゃいずれFri
Day by day 砂時計 山積もる
050phone call
ASAP gotta pick you up so drive, faster
目印のLAWSON 曲がるcorner
手短な挨拶 パパッとride on
前後左右Lookバックミラーウィンカーah
I just wanna chill in the spot
That only I know How I live it up
人目につかないように煙に巻くPolice
After all give it up (Ah ah)
When I clubbin' when I cruzing
When I humping, make a music
残り香染み付いたseat, wet, can not forget
Miss you señorita

[Chorus: MuKuRo]
Oh my Mary (Ay) Jane come back to me I wanna touch all day night
Oh my Mary (Ay) Jane come back to mе come back
Spen the monеy, waste some Time
Know I got it, But Not in vain
Oh my Mary (Ay) Jane come back to me come back
Come back to me Baby come back

どこにいも行かずオレの横にいな
お前のためおろすワンバース
だでLet me see your love for me
Yo my mary I know I'm crazy
引き裂かれる関係故に
人の目気にしてまたWe meet
曇りガラスの向こうYou and me
ドレスはオレ好みのSo green
保つSo fresh so clean
She got a new blush
輝いてるチーク
まるで雪の結晶 You ain't cheep
いつも一緒にいたい ずっと笑ってたい
イニシャルはM プリプリではない
オレとお前のストーリーはいつもHappy End
車内は今日もCaliente

[Chorus: MuKuRo]
Oh my Mary (Ay) Jane come back to me I wanna touch all day night
